texto: People talk about how fast life can go from good to bad. How on day you're happy, everything is going fine, and then something happens. Someone dies or someone leaves. There's an illness or an accident. Life as you know it slips away. But it can got the other way too. You can go from god-awful to pretty OK in a single day. That's what happened to us, and it was just as jarring.
explicacao: Citação de Laura M. Flynn sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “People talk about how fast life can go from good to bad. How on day you're happy, everything is g…” articula felicidade, depression, vida em registro de felicidade, com relevância para contextos como vida.
